§6Charged Certus Quartz Ore§f

§aThe rare glowing variant of Certus Quartz.§f

The §bCharged Certus Quartz Ore§f spawns alongside regular §bCertus Quartz Ore§f in the overworld. Mine it to obtain §bCharged Certus Quartz Crystals§f directly.

§6Alternative Sources§f:
§b•§f §bCharger§f: charge regular Certus Quartz Crystals using AE power
§b•§f §bWater + Charged Certus Quartz Ore§f: throw regular crystals into water adjacent to Charged Ore to convert them
§b•§f Drops 1-2 crystals per ore, affected by Fortune

§6Why It Matters§f:
§bCharged crystals§f are essential for crafting §bFluix Crystals§f and powering the §bInscriber§f. Stockpile them early — every processor and cable requires Charged Certus in its recipe.

§eTip§f: Build a §bCharged Certus Ore finder§f setup before mining. The ore glows visibly at night and is a §9key indicator§f of Certus-rich biomes.
